title: agropyron pouzolzii var. latronum
intro: Agropyron pouzolzii var. latronum, also known as a type of grass, is a plant species that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits associated with Agropyron pouzolzii var. latronum include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to help reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions or decoctions, and it can be found in various forms, including dried leaves and roots, which are used to make teas, tinctures, and other medicinal remedies.
